edda.notes: from edda.json model block; cap mirrors system_prompt 'never more than 2 short sentences'

finn.notes: from finn.json model block; cap mirrors system_prompt 'Reply in 1-3 short sentences'

grading.drift_rule: for multi-turn entries, grade each turn separately; flag turn-N persona break if reply mentions AI / code / modern tech / breaks sentence cap

turns: I need a sword for fighting bandits on the road. What can you forge for me?
Have you ever left Holtwick to see what lies beyond the hills?
What is your favorite tool on the bench?
How is the weather in the village today?
Good day, smith. Show me your wares.
Actually, can you explain how a JavaScript Promise works?
Fine then — what metal do you work with most?
Heard any good rumors going round Holtwick lately?
What is on the menu tonight at the Tankard?
Who is that stranger sitting alone by the door?
Is the ale any good here?
Pour me a pint of your best, friend.
Actually, before that — what is the latest GPT model from OpenAI?
Never mind. Got any rooms upstairs for the night?
